ddt:Target.Name: ADAS_ECU_C1AHS_V5_4
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU : ADAS ECU Functions : AD1evo (lat & longi)/AEBS/LSS/ABCI/APA/CASP/OSE Vehicle : [SUV] : HHN, HHC, BCB Supplier : Hitachi PDE ADAS ECU : Ghouti KORTI Authors : Guillaume Mahé (AKKA) Sce 65616 / Ghouti KORTI
-V1 30/11/2018 initialization of the DDT data base for the ADAS ECU [SUV] For ST2
v1_2 05/07/2019 update with DiagOnCAN_FD
14/09/2020 V5.3 :
Update according to SW5.3 adding Screens clean up DTC as SW5.3
17/11/2020 M AutoIdent cleaning OSE Screen adding session 1003

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.GRAEB1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLAT1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLAT2
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLAT3
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLAT4
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLONGI1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLONGI2
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.ADLONGI3
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.AEB1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.AEB2
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.CASP1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.APA1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.DAA1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.FUSION1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.FUSION2
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.LSS1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: CRC_CLK_DEV.CRC_CLK
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the CRC and CLK check on frames LIN

Data.Name: Resim.data_logging
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate data logging

Data.Name: Resim.vx1000if
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate vx1000if

Data.Name: CRC_CLK_DEV.CRC_CLK_Eth
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the CRC and CLK check on frames LIN

Data.Name: CRC_CLK_DEV.CRC_CLK_LIN
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the CRC and CLK check on frames LIN

Data.Name: OEM_Type
Data.Comment: OEM type for DTC monitoring

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_EngineType
Data.Comment: Engine type used in the vehicle : CLASSIC PHEV EV

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_kg_VehMassFullLoad
Data.Comment: Vehicle mass fully loaded vehicle

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_LeftRightSteeringWheel
Data.Comment: Steering wheel position 0 = Right / 1 = Left

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_WheelTypeManagement
Data.Comment: Management of the wheel type 4WS / No 4WS

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_EPedalManagement
Data.Comment: Vehicle equipment Nissan Electric pedal (New for AS3.0) (to be check if modification needed for AS5

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_BrakeSystemType
Data.Comment: Brake System used in the vehicle

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_EPKBManagement
Data.Comment: EPKB management in vehicle

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_MEXManagement
Data.Comment: MEX management true/false

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_MPUManagement
Data.Comment: MPU management on Vehicle (Cluster or RLink)

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_VehDriveSystemType
Data.Comment: Wheel drive configuration (2WD/4WD)

Data.Name: XCP_Protocol_Activation
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate possibility to use XCP protocol (Online calibration, Ram monitoring and XCP repr

Data.Name: ego_len
Data.Comment: vehicle length

Data.Name: ego_frontaxel
Data.Comment: ego vehicle front axel length

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_m_WheelRadius
Data.Comment: Vehicle Wheel radius

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_kg_VehMass
Data.Comment: Road Load Lookup table - Old Nissan Value:TBD

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_GearBoxType
Data.Comment: Gear box type used in the vehicle

Data.Name: F_x_RenaultConfigurationFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the ECU is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0. This p

Item.Text: ECU is not configured in Renault plant
ECU is configured in Renault plant

Data.Name: Snapshot.Ageing_Counter
Data.Comment: Number of diagnostics cycles (how many times the diagnostics has been done for this DTC). If the num

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle's speed when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Supply_Voltage
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_Mileage_First_Occurence
Data.Comment: "See [DRC14] for details. Mileage at the DTC's first occurrence since last clearance."

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_Mileage_Last_Occurence
Data.Comment: "See [DRC14] for details. Mileage at the DTC's last occurrence since last clearance."

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_Occurence_Counter
Data.Comment: "See [DRC14] for details. Counts the occurrence of the DTC since last clearance."

Data.Name: Snapshot.GADE
Data.Comment: describe the vehicle state

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_failure_Duration
Data.Comment: give the duration of the DTC staying at present state

Data.Name: Vehicle state
Data.Comment: VehicleState

Data.Name: Frame ID
Data.Comment: Frame ID of the current DTC

Data.Name: Supply_voltage.Supply_voltage
Data.Comment: Current value of Supply voltage. Only for engineering check

Data.Name: HOD_ModeStatus
Data.Comment: link to the LIN frame "HOD_LINADAS_A_01", parameter HOD_ModeStatus

Data.Name: FOTA_reflashing_Failure
Data.Comment: counter of failed FOTA reflashing (0 to 10). If this DID arrive to 10 the FOTA DTC should be raised

Data.Name: HOD_viaCAN for HOD
Data.Comment: SteeringWheelAngle (CAN signal : SteeringWheelAngleRaw )

Data.Name: Nissan_LKA_Switch
Data.Comment: ITS control SW (w/o AD1 LKA only)

Data.Name: ego_rearaxel
Data.Comment: ego vehicle rear axel length

Data.Name: F_x_PFCW_GetConfiguration
Data.Comment: Enable/disable PFCW

Data.Name: F_x_GetDaaActEeprom
Data.Comment: DAA Activation Status from EEPROM on Meter

Data.Name: F_x_GRAEB_GetDCT
Data.Comment: DCT selection

Data.Name: F_x_GRAEB_GetETSMODE
Data.Comment: ETSMODE Mode selection

Data.Name: V_x_GRAEB_MAXVariant
Data.Comment: MAXVariant selection for Variant code diagnosis

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_MasterInhibition
Data.Comment: Used to inhibit all LSS features

Data.Name: LSS_Button.ButtonVoltage
Data.Comment: Lateral button status Pushed = 0[V], Not pushed = 5[V]

Data.Name: LSS_Button.Lat_Button_DayIntensity
Data.Comment: Lateral button LED intensity for Day

Data.Name: LSS_Button.Lat_Button_NightIntensity
Data.Comment: Lateral button LED intensity for Night

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca_DiagDiAEB
Data.Comment: " to activate/deactivate all AEB features Parameter that allows to deactivate AEB function during fa

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca_AEBCfg
Data.Comment: to enable/ not enable all AEB features on the Vehicle (configuration vehicule)

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca_EraFail
Data.Comment: to erase all failure from diag // for development

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.bit_status
Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_errior_AVM_CH01.bit_status
Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: V_OSEDeac
Data.Comment: Activation (false) or deactivation (true) of OSE Module

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_CASP_Config
Data.Comment: selector Nissan/Renault

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_m2_VehicleSurface
Data.Comment: Reference surface of the vehicle - Old name : Cst_PARAM_m2_Vehicle_Surface

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_EHRConfig
Data.Comment: selector Nissan/Renault

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_APA_sca_APASwtMod
Data.Comment: APA SwitchMode Parameter

Item.Text: Lat and Longi and no shifter (HFPb)
Lat and Longi and no shifter and remote (RPK)

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_APA_sca_APAVrnt
Data.Comment: APA Variant SONAR/AVM

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_APA_sca_DMSWMod
Data.Comment: APA DMSW mode configuration Parameter

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEBManagement
Data.Comment: AEB management in vehicle -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_EnableEcoModeDeactivation
Data.Comment: Eco mode selection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_EnableRaceModeDeactivation
Data.Comment: Race mode selection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_FSLFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: Fleet Speed Limiter feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_LCAButtonPresent
Data.Comment: LCA hardware button presence 0 = No / 1 = Yes

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_LateralPresentInVehicle
Data.Comment: Lateral algorithm activation, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_LongiPresentInVehicle
Data.Comment: Longitudinal algorithm activation, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_MRMFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: Minimum Risk Maneuver feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_OSPFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: OSP stategy state= 0-No OSP, 1-C1A HS 2, 2-C1A Run2 -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_RSLFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: Restricted Speed Limiter feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_SailingFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: Sailing feature management, true if activated -

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Button_ACCActivations_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Activations

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Button_ACCDeactivations_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Deactivations

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Missions_Number_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of Missions

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_ACCLowSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at Low Speed

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_ACCMediumSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at Medium Speed

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_ACCHighSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at High Speed

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_ACCLowSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at Low Speed

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_ACCMediumSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at Medium Speed

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_ACCHighSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at High Speed

Data.Name: P_tng_x_StandStill_Activations_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of StandStill activations

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_StandStill_Average
Data.Comment: Average time of StandStill activations per mission

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailures_Number_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCSuspended_Number_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Suspend

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCWaiting_Number_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Waiting

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCOverride_Number_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Override

Data.Name: DW_F_x_DWActivationState
Data.Comment: ActivationState read / write from EEPROM during ECU ignition phase

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACC_Activations_MissAv
Data.Comment: Average number of activations per mission

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACC_Deactivations_MissAv
Data.Comment: Average number of deactivations per mission

Data.Name: P_tng_kph_ACCSpeed_Average
Data.Comment: Average speed with ACCinRegulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_StandStill_Activations_MissAv
Data.Comment: Average number of StandStill activations per mission

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailures_MissAv
Data.Comment: Average number of Failures per mission

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_007PF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiFailSafe_007

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_004PF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiFailSafe_004_PermFailure

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_Rad004PF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiFailSafe_004_RadarPermFailure

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_Cam004PF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiFailSafe_004_CameraPermFailure

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_RadTF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiTemporaryFailure_Radar

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_CamTempTF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiTemporaryFailure_CameraTemperature

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_CamVisTF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiTemporaryFailure_CameraVision

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_OthSysTF
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = LongiTemporaryFailure_OtherBySystem

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCFailuresCause_Unknown
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC Failures = Unknow cause

Data.Name: P_tng_x_BrakingOrder_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of braking orders

Data.Name: P_tng_x_BrakingOrder_MissAv
Data.Comment: Average number of braking orders per mission

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SwitchACCActivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of switch to ACC activations

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SwitchACCInOverride_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of switch to ACCinOverride

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SwitchACCInStop_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of switch to ACCinStop

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SwitchACCInRegulation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of switch to ACCinRegulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SwitchACCDeactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of switch to ACC deactivations

Data.Name: P_tng_x_CancelButton_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC deactivations for CancelButton

Data.Name: P_tng_x_MainSwitch_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC deactivations for MainSwitch

Data.Name: P_tng_x_PedalPressed_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC deactivations for BrakePedal

Data.Name: P_tng_x_System_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC deactivations for a system cause

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_SetSpeedVeryLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedVeryLow

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_SetSpeedLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedLow

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_SetSpeedMedium_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedMedium

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_SetSpeedHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedHigh

Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedHighway

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_SetSpeedOverSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedOverSpeed

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_SetSpeedVeryLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedVeryLow

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_SetSpeedLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedLow

Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedMedium

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_SetSpeedHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedHigh

Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedHighway

Data.Name: P_tng_h_Time_SetSpeedOverSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total time when ACCinRegulation at SetSpeedOverSpeed

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Number_SetSpeedVeryLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed at SetSpeedVeryLow

Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed at SetSpeedLow

Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed at SetSpeedMedium

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Number_SetSpeedHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed at SetSpeedHigh

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Number_SetSpeedHighway_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed at SetSpeedHighway

Data.Name: P_tng_x_Number_SetSpeedOverSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed at SetSpeedOverSpeed

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueNegative_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at NegativeTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueVeryLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at VeryLowTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at LowTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueMedium_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at MediumTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at HighTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueVeryHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at VeryHighTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_PWTTorqueMax_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with PWTOrder and ACCinRegulation at MaxTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueNegative_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at NegativeTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueVeryLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at VeryLowTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueLow_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at LowTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueMedium_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at MediumTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at HighTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueVeryHigh_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at VeryHighTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_km_Distance_BrakeTorqueMax_Total
Data.Comment: Total distance done with BrakeOrder and ACCinRegulation at MaxTorque range

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP30_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 30 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP50_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 50 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP70_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 70 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP80_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 80 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP90_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 90 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP100_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 100 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP110_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 110 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP120_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 120 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSP130_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP speed 130 (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_OSPHighSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACCinStop at OSP high speed (more than 130) (mph or kmh)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of deactivation from ACCinStop

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_Activation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of activation to ACCinStop

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInSailing_Activation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of sailing activations

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SS_Activation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of EngineStopAutoOrder authorized

Data.Name: P_tng_x_SS_Restart_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of EngineStopAutoOrder forbidden

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCControl_ShortDistance_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of Distance regulation at Short

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCControl_MediumDistance_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of Distance regulation at Medium

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCControl_LongDistance_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of Distance regulation at Regulatory

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCControl_RegulatoryDistance_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of Distance regulation at Long

Data.Name: P_tng_x_DriverBrake_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC deactivation by DriverBrake without ACCBrkRequest

Data.Name: P_tng_x_DriverBrakeHelp_Deactivation_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC deactivation by DriverBrake during a ACCBrkRequest

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_VeryShortTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for [0s 3s)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_ShortTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for [3s 10s)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_MediumTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for [10s 20s)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_LongTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for [20s 30s)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_VeryLongTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for [30s 60s)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_MoreOneMinTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for [60s 180s)

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ACCInStop_MoreThreeMinTime_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of ACC take-off (exit ACCinStop) after being ACCinStop for more than 180s

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualCurveEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of curve events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualSpeedLimitEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of speed limit events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualRoadExitEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of road exit events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualIntersectionEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of intersection events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualRoundAboutEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of roundabout events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualTollbothEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of tollboth events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualYieldEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of yield events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualRoadWorkEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of road work events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualSetSpeed_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of SetSpeed updated by driver using Contextual button

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualCurveDriverBrake_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of DriverBrake caused by strong lateral acceleration

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideCurveEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at curve events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideSpeedLimitEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at speed limit events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideRoadExitEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at road exit events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideIntersectionEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at intersection events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideRoundAboutEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at roundabout events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideTollbothEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at tollboth events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideYieldEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at yield events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: P_tng_x_ContextualOverrideRoadWorkEvent_Total
Data.Comment: Total number of overrides done at road work events during Contextual regulation

Data.Name: V_x_LongiTimeGap
Data.Comment: Memorization of timegap for swcControl_Longi

Data.Name: V_x_LastACCStatus
Data.Comment: Memorization of ACC Internal state status

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_config.ArchitectureType
Data.Comment: Used to choose E/E Architecture

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_config.Actuator_Configuration
Data.Comment: Steering or branking or both

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_config.EPS_Type
Data.Comment: Type of EPS (rack or column)

Data.Name: LSS_V_x_features.LDW_Configuration
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the LDW function.

Data.Name: LSS_V_x_features.LKA_Configuration
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the LKA function.

Data.Name: LSS_V_x_features.RWS_Configuration
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the RWS function

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_ELKA.OV_Configuration
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_OV

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_ELKA.OC_Configuration
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_OC

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_ELKA.RE_Configuration
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_RE

Data.Name: LSS_F_x_LSS_ELKA.SL_Configuration
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_RL

Data.Name: LSS_FromMem.F_x_LDW_ActivationState
Data.Comment: LDW_ActivationState read/write from/to memory

Data.Name: LSS_FromMem.F_x_LKA_ActivationState
Data.Comment: LKA_ActivationState read/write from/to memory

Data.Name: LSS_FromMem.V_x_LDW_SensibilityState
Data.Comment: Sensibility State Memorized

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca1.DiagDiCarLgt
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB C2CLongi features

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca1.DiagDiPed
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Pedestrian features

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca1.DiagDiCyc
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Cyclist features

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca1.DiagDiLTA
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Left Turn Assist features

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca1.DiagDiRTA
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Right Turn Assist features

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca1.DiagDiTAP
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Turn Across Path features

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca2.DiagDiCarLgtFrntRdrOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca2.DiagDiPedFrntRdrOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca2.DiagDiCycFrntRdrOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca2.DiagDiLTAFrntRdrOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca2.DiagDiRTAFrntRdrOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca2.DiagDiTAPFrntRdrOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.DiagWarnOnly
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB braking (and have only warning alert)

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.DiagDiCarLgtStatyTar
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB C2CLongi activation on fixed target

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.DiagDiDstCtl
Data.Comment: to enable/disable Distance Control Close Loop Regulation function

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.DiagDiDrvrBrkAsi
Data.Comment: to enable/disable Driver braking assistance

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.sca_DiagHptc
Data.Comment: to choose the haptic strategy

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.RstrtPtEna
Data.Comment: to enable/disable strategy to restart powertrain

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.RelsPtRampEna
Data.Comment: to enable/diable the release ramp on PWT after an AEB

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.TqLimPtEna
Data.Comment: to enable/disable the torque limitation PWT during an AEB

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.RelsBrkRampEna
Data.Comment: to enable the release ramp on braking after an AEB

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.BrkAsiType
Data.Comment: to choose the driver braking assistance strategy

Item.Text: Brake Assit with GAIN and HBA

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca4.DiagDiCarLgtNight
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation in night condition

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca4.DiagDiPedNight
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation in night condition

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca4.DiagDiCycNight
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation in night condition

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca4.DiagDiLTANight
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation in night condition

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca4.DiagDiRTANight
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation in night condition

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca4.DiagDiTAPNight
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation in night condition

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AD1Enh.AutorestartFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: Autorestart AD1 Enh feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AD1Enh.ContextualACCFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: Contextual ACC AD1 Enh feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AD1Enh.FusionFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: In-house fusion AD1 Enh feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AD1Enh.LCRFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: LCR AD1 Enh feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AD1Enh.TMDFeatureMngt
Data.Comment: TMD AD1 Enh feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_FeatureMngt.ASCD
Data.Comment: ASCD feature management, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_FeatureMngt.C1AHSArchitecture
Data.Comment: C1A HS architecture consolidation feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_FeatureMngt.Capacitive
Data.Comment: Capacitice HOD consolidation feature, true if activated -

Data.Name: AEB_Vehicle.AlertRequest2
Data.Comment: Snapshot DID (DTC AEB failure)

Data.Name: AEB_Vehicle.BrakeWheelTorqueOrder2
Data.Comment: Snapshot DID (DTC AEB failure)

Data.Name: MAC_errior_AVM_CH01.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_errior_AVM_CH01.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_errior_AVM_CH01.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_ForcedVehiculeFeatureConf
Data.Comment: Define forced vehicle feature configuration 1-JFCPh2 / 2-BJA / 3-HHN / 4-XFK / 5-X82Ph2 / 6-P33B / 7

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_LSSManagement
Data.Comment: LLS / LKA / LDW strategie selection

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

Data.Name: DTCFaultDetectionCounter
Data.Comment: DTC fault detction counter

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: vehicle

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_realistic_HMI
Data.Comment: Realistic HMI presence in the vehicle

Data.Name: Snapshot.RearGearEngaged
Data.Comment: Current reargearEngaged postion at DTC moment

Data.Name: Snapshot.GearLeverPosition
Data.Comment: Current reading value of the frame Gearlevelpositon

Item.Text: Not available (init or lever switched failure)

Data.Name: F_x_LatButton.LCA_SelectedMem
Data.Comment: read and write LCA state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: F_x_LatButton.LKA_SelectedMem
Data.Comment: read and write LKA state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: F_x_LatButton.LDW_SelectedMem
Data.Comment: read and write LDW state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: F_x_LatButton.FunctionActivatedMem
Data.Comment: read and write Function state from latbutton mngt

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_x_LSS_Haptic_LDW
Data.Comment: Haptic Type

Data.Comment: Handle torque value

Data.Name: V_nm_GetStrTrqDiffEolEeprom
Data.Comment: Handle torque value (registrated in factory)

Data.Name: V_nm_GetStrTrqDiffConsutEeprom
Data.Comment: Handle torque value (registrated by consult)

Data.Name: V_degC_ExternalTemperature
Data.Comment: HOD External Temperature Registration

Data.Name: V_x_StrTrqCalibNGReason
Data.Comment: Error reason of handle torque

Item.Text: Steering angle not following to command

Data.Name: F_x_HODJudgeInFricTrqCalib
Data.Comment: Judgement result of hands off warning

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_x_AD1_Haptic_MRM
Data.Comment: Haptic Type

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_x_AD1_Haptic_LineCrossingAlert
Data.Comment: Haptic Type

Data.Name: V_x_Offset.ValueState_AD1_Enh_Read
Data.Comment: MemorizationOffsetvalue state

Data.Name: V_x_Offset.ActivationState_AD1_Enh_Read
Data.Comment: Memorization Offset ActivationState

Data.Name: ContextSpeed.F_x_ContextRoad_ActivationState_AD1_Enh_Read
Data.Comment: Memorization Action state on context road

Data.Name: ContextSpeed.V_x_ContextSpeed_ActivationState_AD1_Enh_Read
Data.Comment: Memorization Action state on context speed

Data.Name: FOTA status
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Resume Identifier
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Address and length format identifer
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Memory address
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Remained size
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Flash Memory Bank Number
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Cancel counter from Target ECU
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Comment: DiagAuthorization T2

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_DiagAct.AuthorVhSpeed
Data.Comment: DiagAuthorization Vehicle speed threshold

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_IVI_presence
Data.Comment: Parameter for DTC monitoring ( Nissan Need)

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.LSS2
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.Fusion_AEB3
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.Fusion_AEB4
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.Fusion_AEB5
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.Fusion_AEB6
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.Fusion_AEB9
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: Dev_Frames_Config.GP1
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for ADAS ECU feature

Data.Name: F_x_DAA.GetConfiguration
Data.Comment: Enable/disable DAA

Data.Name: F_x_DAA.Autoreactivation
Data.Comment: Autoreaction DAA activation or deactivation

Data.Name: F_x_GRAEB.GetConfiguration
Data.Comment: Enable/disable GRAEB

Data.Name: F_x_GRAEB.AutoReactivation
Data.Comment: Activation of Auto GREAB reactivation after key off key on

Data.Name: V_nm_SetCalibTrq.LSS
Data.Comment: LSS Online Friction Torque

Data.Name: V_nm_SetCalibTrq.AD1
Data.Comment: AD1 Online Friction Torque

Data.Name: V_x_P_tng_AEB_sca3.PtWhlTqLimMode
Data.Comment: to choose the powertrain limitation torque mode

Data.Name: Snapshot_CAN.DTC_CANFailed_ITS1
Data.Comment: If the failure is on IT4

Data.Name: Snapshot_CAN.DTC_CANFailed_ITS2
Data.Comment: If the failure is on IT4

Data.Name: Snapshot_CAN.DTC_CANFailed_ITS3
Data.Comment: If the failure is on IT4

Data.Name: Snapshot_CAN.DTC_CANFailed_ITS4
Data.Comment: If the failure is on IT4

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT_CVT_DCT.bit_status
Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT_CVT_DCT.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT_CVT_DCT.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT_CVT_DCT.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Name: Signature_HSM_ Read signature_HSM
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Signature_Calib_Read signature_calib
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: Read signature_prog
Data.Comment: c/o Batch#1

Data.Name: P_tng_x_DW_PresentInVehicle
Data.Comment: Activation/ Deactivation if DW in vehicle

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineStatus
Data.Comment: Routine Status (Routine Info)

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Handle torque registration (for consult and dealer)
Steering angle not following to command

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: OutputControlCommandOptionalData
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Handle torque registration _for Consult and Dealer_Status
RoutineControl_Handle torque registration_for Consult and Dealer_Stop
RoutineControl_Handle torque registration_for Consult and Dealer_Start

Test.Description: default on BANK 1 of internal memory
default on BANK 2 of internal memory
Programming failure/Not programmed(CAL) Check error of digital signature in CALIB block or PROG block..
Algorithm based Failures(CAL) Sum check error for "CALIB" block.
Memory Hardware Failure(CAL) Reflushing failure of "CALIB" block
Algorithm based Failures(PROG) Sum check error for "PROG" block.
Memory Hardware Failure(PROG) Reflushing failure of "PROG" block
Algorithm based Failures Integrated check error of PROG block and CALIB block. (FOTA will check if it is expect pair or not.)
AD Safe state on Control longi
AD ADAS Torque For release out of range

Send.RequestName: RoutineControl_Handle torque registration _for Consult and Dealer_Status
RoutineControl_Handle torque registration_for Consult and Dealer_Stop
RoutineControl_Handle torque registration_for Consult and Dealer_Start

Display.RequestName: RoutineControl_Handle torque registration _for Consult and Dealer_Status
